descriptionHtml:
Hanse 630 for Sale 2008: A Well-Maintained Sailing Yacht, Tax PAID

If you’re in the market for a practical and stylish sailing yacht, the Hanse 630 for sale 2008, known as KAZE, is worth considering. This vessel is in very good condition and has recently undergone significant renovations to its interior in 2022, resulting in a fresh and functional space that is perfect for both relaxed sailing and adventure.

Key Features of the Hanse 630 for sale 2008

The Hanse 630 for sale 2008 stands out for its efficient design and solid performance. It’s designed to cater to sailing enthusiasts who appreciate both speed and comfort. Here are the primary specifications:

  • Overall Length: 19 m
  • Beam: 5.20 m
  • Draft: 2.95 m
  • Fuel Tanks: 700 L
  • Water Tanks: 900 L
  • Engine: Volvo D3-150 CV (2015)
  • Generator: Whisper 10 kW

These specifications contribute to the yacht’s performance, making it a favorable choice for various sailing conditions.

Interior and Comfort

Inside, the Hanse 630 offers a spacious salon, designed to ensure comfort during your travels. The interiors are characterized by their minimalist design, featuring an appealing color scheme of white and gray. Notable amenities include:

  • Smart TV (55”)
  • Air Conditioning in all cabins
  • Solar Panels
  • Bluetooth Music System
  • Foredeck Sunbathing Area
  • Cushions in the Cockpit
  • Bathing Platform Garage
  • Hot Water Shower at the Stern
  • Water Maker

This setup makes the yacht suitable for both short trips and longer voyages, ensuring that you have all the necessary comforts at your fingertips.

Navigation and Electronics

The Hanse 630 is equipped with reliable navigation electronics to enhance the overall sailing experience. Key features include:

  • Electric Winches
  • Hydraulic Backstay and Adjustments
  • Complete Electronics Package
  • AIS (Automatic Identification System)
  • Carbon Rudders and Boom
  • Roller Gennaker (optional)

The sailing capabilities are enhanced by a fully battened mainsail with two reefs (2018) and an 85 m² self-tacking jib (2018). These features not only improve handling but also ensure that the yacht can perform well in varying conditions.

Outdoor Features

The exterior of the Hanse 630 is designed with both aesthetics and functionality in mind. The deck, finished in teak, provides a practical layout for various outdoor activities. Key outdoor features include:

  • Teak Cockpit
  • Hydraulic Gangway
  • Dinghy Storage
  • Hydraulic Passerelle for Easy Docking
  • Rooftop Solar Panels for Efficient Energy Use

These elements make the yacht suitable for easy boarding and loading, as well as for maintaining energy efficiency while at sea.

Conclusion

The Hanse 630 for sale 2008 is a well-maintained sailboat that offers a balanced combination of comfort and performance. Its condition is very good, making it a smart choice for anyone looking to invest in a reliable vessel. Whether you aim to enjoy weekend outings or seek to embark on longer sailing adventures, KAZE provides a solid option that can meet your needs. We are looking forward to hearing from you.
